text: Subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message dekha toh mere haath-paanv thande pad gaye aur main wahi shop ke counter pe baith kar rone laga. Biwi ke hospital bills ne saari savings wipe out kar di hain aur ab dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai, main bill book bhi nahi dekh paa raha hoon. Is waqt mujhe koi loan restructure ya financial calculation nahi sujh raha, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

Bank ka notification dekh kar mera dum ghutne laga hai kyunki maine apni dukan ka stock aur bacha-kucha sona bech diya tha hospital ka karz chukane ke liye. Family head hone ke naate 'log kya kahenge' ye soch kar main bilkul toot gaya hoon aur mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai jisne mujhe jhakad liya hai.

Medical expense spiral ne humein road par la diya hai aur aaj kist bounce hone par main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takta raha. Gaon mein kisan baap ki chit fund wali savings bhi khatam ho gayi, ye soch kar dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai aur rone ka control nahi ho raha. Is waqt business ya agla kadam dimaag mein nahi aa raha, bas ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe saans nahi lene de raha.

Aaj bank se call aaya ki loan default ho gaya hai aur main wahi ghar ke aangan mein baith gaya, mujhse bacchon se baat bhi nahi kari ja rahi. Itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad ye zillat dekh kar dimaag sunn ho chuka hai aur bas wahi ICU ke bills dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain. Main koi backup plan ya financial help nahi soch sakta, bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main khota ja raha hoon.

Bhai ke accident mein saari jama-poonji chali gayi aur ab bank ka bounce alert dekh kar mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Sahukaar ka karz pehle se tha aur ab ye notification dekh kar main bilkul breakdown kar gaya hoon aur dimaag blank hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur darr lag raha hai ki poora parivaar bikhar jayega.
